title: Off Course in Melbourne Lost in a Fire
content:
We just saw on Instagram that Melbourne, Australia’s Off Course bike shop, has caught fire, and unfortunately, the shop has been lost. Huw and the team are processing the loss now. Off Course stated that the fire department is investigating the cause of the blaze, but that the shop had been completely burned and was lost.

We’re sending our love to Huw and the entire team at Off-Course. May you rise like a Phoenix from the flames. What you’ve built for the Melbourne community is bigger than stock. You’ll be back, better than ever!

If you’d like to show support for Off-Course, leave them a comment on this Instagram Reel. And if you’d like to see what the shop looked like, check out our Shop Visit and bike checks in the Archives below.

 

The post Off Course in Melbourne Lost in a Fire appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
